$comment: Module manifest. Copy this directory to create a new module, then edit every field. The manifest is the contract between a module and the Jarvis core: it declares what the module provides, what it depends on, and where its prompts/workflows/healthcheck live (Plugin Architecture / Separation of concerns).
name: Module Template
description: Copy-me template for a self-contained Jarvis capability module. Replace every field with your module's specifics.

envVars.name: TEMPLATE_FEATURE_ENABLED
envVars.description: Set to 'true' to enable this module's workflow.
